_comment: Item grid sizes (gridW x gridH in inventory cells) and weapon/container stats. Loaded by ItemGridConfig. Kept separate from items.json to avoid bloat. All paths relative to assets/. gridW/gridH: how many inventory cells wide/tall the item occupies. Item icon is drawn aspect-ratio-correct inside the cell area (never stretched). rotated: per-instance field in ItemInstance — swaps gridW↔gridH.
